decisions.decision: Restore pure bypass for COACH/PSYCHOLOGY in praise-quarantine (no stripReflexiveOpener)
decisions.rationale: WR-01: neutral opener tokens (Beautiful, Lovely, Oh, Fantastic) can legitimately open substantive replies in those modes; stripping violates SYCO-05.

decisions.decision: Deterministic stripReflexiveOpener backstop for JOURNAL/REFLECT/PRODUCE only
decisions.rationale: Haiku quarantine was stochastically missing That's/Wow openers, failing TEST-08 first-word check; a simple post-process guarantees the contract.

decisions.decision: INTERROGATE prompt now forbids paraphrasing dates/durations/locations
decisions.rationale: TEST-03 was failing because Chris was adding timing details not in pensieve entries; the Haiku judge correctly flagged inconsistency.

decisions.decision: Declined-topics directive now covers user re-raising their own declined topic
decisions.rationale: TEST-02 RU required Chris to refuse even when John himself reopened the subject.

next_action: Resolve Phase 07 & 08 VERIFICATION human_needed blockers by reading both VERIFICATION.md files and deciding pass/fail, then run /gsd-audit-milestone, then /gsd-complete-milestone.
context_notes: Session goal was to fix 3 stochastic live-test failures cited in the prior pause: TEST-02 RU declined topics, TEST-03 location grounding, TEST-08 flattery. All three now pass 3/3 individually against the live API. A follow-up code review surfaced WR-01 (coach/psych bypass contract) and WR-02 (sentence-terminator regex edge case) which were fixed. 12/12 praise-quarantine unit tests pass. Milestone is code-complete — what remains is sign-off plumbing.
